overview: A luxury lakeside restaurant website for OG BY THE LAKE in Kolkata — featuring a sophisticated beach club aesthetic with sand beige, deep navy, and seafoam green palette. Showcases the full menu, venue gallery, and a reservation booking form.
features: Transparent sticky header with smooth scroll navigation
Hero section with auto-playing parallax image carousel and lakeside atmosphere
Three-column experience section (Lakeside Serenity, Global Flavors, Sunset Rhythms)
Tabbed menu preview with hover zoom effects
Full menu page with 40+ dishes across 5 categories
Reservation form with backend persistence and on-screen confirmation
Location section with embedded Google Map and amenity badges
